{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603220314029054AFC726D45F628EF9"}"},"total":174},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7506613485525697305","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"写的很温馨，很舒服。真的好喜欢何以琛，特别喜欢原创女主来爱他的！我喜欢这种从一开始就不掺杂第三个人的恋爱！自始至终都是两个人，好美好好浪漫。恋爱脑是男生最好的陪嫁[飞吻]","text_exts":[{"e":73,"s":70,"text":"恋爱脑","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E6%81%8B%E7%88%B1%E8%84%91&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%2317741204425F628EF9%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227506613485525697305%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227472376539292650558%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E6%81%8B%E7%88%B1%E8%84%91%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1747789198,"group_id":"7472376539292650558","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NzcXzIdVAJ+wqz7wUmLYmr3hyhFQpniCT5T3wbOmd5dZ","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/6f58ff794e9e40949f19a35dde7c798b~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776702819&x-signature=VQW1pvfSNXHuVEIHvu4ybQl%2B%2B%2FA%3D","user_id":"3980647065721991","user_name":"冰冰冰冰冰冰！！！"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3980647065721991","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7472376539292650558","book_info":{"abstract":"【女主盛世美颜+甜宠+男主恋爱脑+快穿+独宠+系统+打脸】
吸收天地灵韵化形绿茶精沈妩，为了气运之子的气运，开启甜宠快穿综影视世界之旅

面对系统发来的摆烂质问

绿茶精沈妩：高端的绿茶向来是让对方主动，似有若无的撩感最诱人了好么

后面可能会有逐玉，难哄，河道英，马文才，偷偷藏不住，三生三世，少年派，许我耀眼等等
都是自己喜欢的男主人设
女主控，女主不会虐一点，甜宠

微微一笑很倾城
          肖奈vs心机绿茶校花已完结
         
我的人间烟火
         孟宴臣vs青梅竹马大小姐已完结

何以笙箫默
         何以琛vs病弱白月光已完结

小巷人家
                林栋哲vs娇矜团宠小公主已完结
甄嬛传 爱新觉罗·胤禛✓
小欢喜 季杨杨✓
亲爱的热爱的 吴白✓
星汉灿烂 袁慎袁善见✓
爱你 何苏叶✓
请回答1988
